name: Here particular reference is made to the dismal end of those so-called religious leaders
introduction:
who mislead people, and of their gullible followers who fall easy prey to their deception.
This has been done in order to warn the Muslims to beware of the errors which misled
former nations, and to impress upon them the need to develop the capacity to distinguish
between true and spurious leaders so as to avoid being led by the latter.
